query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') as img1, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[1].imageUrl') as img2, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') as img3 FROM reviews WHERE id = 630002
